ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., any, string, number, boolean, date) */,
  "shortcut" TEXT /* Shortcut for the data type (e.g., undefined, String, Number, Boolean, Date) */,
  "js_type" TEXT /* JavaScript type for the data type (e.g., *, String,null, Number,null, Boolean,null, Date,null) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the data type (e.g., undefined, '', 0, false, None) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment describing the data type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., primitive, object, date) */,
  "is_convertible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the data type can be converted */,
  "is_date_related" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the data type is date-related */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion rule */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the conversion rule belongs to */,
  "conversion_rule" TEXT /* Conversion rule for the data type (e.g., ensure string, ensure number, ensure boolean, convert to JS Date) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the conversion rule is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the conversion rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the validation rule belongs to */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the data type (e.g., not null, not empty, valid date) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the validation rule is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validations_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defaults" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default value */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the default value belongs to */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the data type (e.g., undefined, '', 0, false, None) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the default value is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the default value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defaults_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment describing the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data type */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data type was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "js_types" (
  "js_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JavaScript type */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the JavaScript type belongs to */,
  "js_type" TEXT /* JavaScript type for the data type (e.g., *, String,null, Number,null, Boolean,null, Date,null) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the JavaScript type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("js_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_js_types_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shortcuts" (
  "shortcut_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shortcut */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the shortcut belongs to */,
  "shortcut" TEXT /* Shortcut for the data type (e.g., undefined, String, Number, Boolean, Date) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the shortcut was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shortcut_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shortcuts_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_rules" (
  "conversion_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion rule */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the conversion rule belongs to */,
  "conversion_rule" TEXT /* Conversion rule for the data type (e.g., ensure string, ensure number, ensure boolean, convert to JS Date) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the conversion rule is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the conversion rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_rules_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "validation_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the validation rule belongs to */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the data type (e.g., not null, not empty, valid date) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the validation rule is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_values" (
  "default_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default value */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the default value belongs to */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the data type (e.g., undefined, '', 0, false, None) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the default value is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the default value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_values_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments_data_types" (
  "comment_data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment describing the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_data_types_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
